    "/api/v1/operations/coord/prompt-documents": {
      "get": {
        "description": "List the tenant's prompt documents (no bodies), optionally filtered to a\nsingle ``kind``. Any authenticated tenant member.\n\nCoord's list route seeds the canonical documents on first touch, so a fresh\ntenant sees the full set immediately. An unknown ``kind`` is coord's 400.",
        "operationId": "api_v1_operations_coord_prompt_documents_get",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "in": "query",
            "name": "kind",
            "required": false,
            "schema": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "null"
                }
              ],
              "title": "Kind"
            }
          }
        ],
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "title": "Response List Prompt Documents Api V1 Operations Coord Prompt Documents Get"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "CookieOrBearerScheme": []
          }
        ],
        "summary": "List Prompt Documents",
        "tags": [
          "operations"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/operations/coord/prompt-documents/{kind}": {
      "post": {
        "description": "Create a new hand-authored prompt document under ``kind``. Tenant-admin only.\n\nThe body is forwarded as ``{name, description?, body, format?}`` with\n``updated_by`` stamped from the authenticated session (see\n:func:`_editor_identity`) \u2014 a body-supplied ``updated_by`` is ignored, so the\nversion-1 snapshot coord writes carries the real author. Coord validates the\nkebab-case ``name`` and non-empty ``body`` (its 400 passes through) and\nanswers 409 when ``(tenant, kind, name)`` already exists; coord's 201 status\nis echoed to the browser verbatim.",
        "operationId": "api_v1_operations_coord_prompt_documents_kind_post",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "in": "path",
            "name": "kind",
            "required": true,
            "schema": {
              "title": "Kind",
              "type": "string"
            }
          }
        ],
        "requestBody": {
          "content": {
            "application/json": {
              "schema": {
                "additionalProperties": true,
                "title": "Body",
                "type": "object"
              }
            }
          },
          "required": true
        },
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {}
              }
            },
            "description": "Successful Response"
          },
          "422": {
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {
                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }
            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "CookieOrBearerScheme": []
          }
        ],
        "summary": "Create Prompt Document",
        "tags": [
          "operations"
        ]
      }
    },
    "/api/v1/operations/coord/prompt-documents/{kind}/{name}": {
      "get": {
        "description": "Fetch one prompt document (with body) by ``(kind, name)``. Any\nauthenticated tenant member.",
        "operationId": "api_v1_operations_coord_prompt_documents_kind_name_get",

            },
            "description": "Validation Error"
          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "CookieOrBearerScheme": []
          }
        ],
        "summary": "Get Prompt Document",
        "tags": [
          "operations"

      },
      "patch": {
        "description": "Edit a prompt document's description/body.           "200": {

              "application/json": {
                "schema": {

            },
            "description": "Successful Response"

          "422": {

                  "$ref": "#/components/schemas/HTTPValidationError"
                }
              }

          }
        },
        "security": [
          {
            "CookieOrBearerScheme": []
          }
        ],
        "summary": "Update Prompt Document",
        "tags": [
          "operations"
        ]
      }
    },
